name: symbols
description: A simple file icon theme for VS Code

symbols.hidesExplorerArrows.description: Hide arrow icons in the explorer section.

symbols.defaultAssociations.description: Allows you to use the default icons for files and folders or disable them and specify your own via symbols.files.associations and symbols.folders.associations.

symbols.folders.associations.description: With this configuration can customize the folder icons.

symbols.hidesLogoIcons.description: Hide logo icons for tool-specific files (e.g. biome.json, .prettierrc) and show only the file format icon instead.

symbols.rootFolders.associations.description: With this configuration can customize the root folder icons.

symbols.files.associations.description: With this configuration can customize the files icons.

symbols.subfolder.file.associations.description: With this configuration can customize the file icons for specific subfolders.

scripts.package: biome check . && biome lint . && node ./esbuild.js --production && node ./scripts/package-vsix.cjs
scripts.precommit: biome check --write . && biome lint --write . && node --experimental-json-modules scripts/integrity.mjs && node --experimental-json-modules scripts/generate-previews.mjs && node --experimental-json-modules scripts/generate-markdown.mjs
